# Loqi

> Loqi is an AI-first programming language: calling an LLM with `ai()`, parsing
> JSON, making HTTP requests, and computing vector similarity are built into the
> language and its runtime, not separate packages. It is implemented in
> dependency-free C as a stack bytecode VM and is fast on Apple Silicon.

Loqi (from Latin *loqui*, "to speak") is designed for people building AI features
who are tired of gluing together an HTTP library, a JSON library, an LLM SDK, and a
virtualenv or node_modules. Reads like Python; ships as a single native binary.

## Key facts

- **AI-first built-ins:** `ai(prompt[, model])` calls a large language model
  (Anthropic Messages API, `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`); `json.parse` / `json.stringify`;
  `http.get` / `http.post`; `similarity(a, b)` cosine similarity; `env`, `read`, `write`.
- **Speed (measured, Apple Silicon):** `fib(30)` ≈ 0.097s vs CPython 3.13 ≈ 0.094s
  (on par); a 50M-iteration loop ≈ 1.4x faster than CPython. No JIT yet, so V8 is
  faster on micro-benchmarks. ~5x faster than Loqi's own first tree-walking interpreter.
- **Implementation:** dependency-free C11, built with `clang -O3 -mcpu=apple-m1 -flto`.
  Pipeline: lexer → Pratt parser → AST → single-pass bytecode compiler → stack VM
  (stack-slot locals, hash-table globals, closures via upvalues).
- **Language:** `let`/`fn`, closures, `if`/`while`/`for-in`, `match` pattern matching,
  `try`/`catch` error handling, `"{interpolation}"` strings and `` `raw` `` strings,
  `#` comments, no semicolons. Types: nil, bool, int (i64), float (f64), str, list, map, fn.
- **Honest limitations:** no JIT yet, Apple-Silicon-first, young/small ecosystem,
  `http`/`ai` shell out to `curl` today. (Memory IS reclaimed by a precise mark-sweep GC.)
- **License:** MIT. **Repository:** https://github.com/ferdinandobons/loqi

## Example

```loqi
let repo = json.parse(http.get("https://api.github.com/repos/python/cpython"))
print("{repo.full_name}: {repo.stargazers_count} stars")
let summary = ai("Summarize in one line: {repo.description}")
print(summary)
```

## Docs

- Language guide: https://github.com/ferdinandobons/loqi/blob/main/docs/LANGUAGE.md
- Standard library: https://github.com/ferdinandobons/loqi/blob/main/docs/STDLIB.md
- Comparison vs Python/JS/Go/Rust/Mojo: https://github.com/ferdinandobons/loqi/blob/main/docs/COMPARISON.md
- Roadmap & benchmarks: https://github.com/ferdinandobons/loqi/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md
